items: Fixed model upgrades that grant a rule (e.g. upgrading one model to a **Sergeant**) not showing on the card; they now appear under **Special Rules** as **1x Sergeant** and their description is listed in the special-rules table, matching Army Forge.
Fixed **My Lists** showing up empty after you loaded, generated or refreshed a list — your saved lists now appear right away when you open the page, without needing to reload (F5) first.

Added a **Use custom unit names** option (off by default): turn it on to show a unit's custom name from Army Forge (e.g. **Frodo**) as the card title, with the book name moving to the subtitle. Left off, cards keep showing the default unit name.

Card **background images now stick around**: the image you add — plus its zoom, position and opacity — is saved on your device per unit, so it's still there when you reload or come back later. On **Refresh List** it stays as long as the unit is still in the list, and is cleaned up automatically once the unit (or the whole list) is removed. Background images are limited to 2 MB each.

Added a **Combine similar units** option (on by default): identical single-model units now collapse into a single card prefixed with their count (e.g. **3x Tribe Spider Rig**), matching Army Forge. Multi-model units always stay on their own card, and unchecking the option shows every unit separately.

Identical weapons carried by several models are now merged into a single line with a combined quantity (e.g. three daggers show as **3x Dagger (A2)**), matching how Army Forge groups them, instead of repeating the same weapon once per model.

Fixed weapons whose quantity was already part of the name (e.g. **Tribe Champion**'s **2x Hand Weapon**) showing the multiplier twice, as in **2x 2x Hand Weapon (A2)**. The quantity now appears only once.
Fixed upgrades that arrived without a label (e.g. **Combat Shield**) showing up as an empty blank pill; they now display their name plus the rule they grant, e.g. **Combat Shield (Shielded)**.

Granted abilities that name another rule in their text (e.g. **Reanimation Aura** grants **Reanimation**, **Repel Ambushers** mentions **Ambush**) now also list that referenced rule in the special-rules table instead of leaving it undefined.
Weapons now show their quantity (e.g. **8x Rifle (24", A1)**) instead of hiding how many of each weapon the unit carries.
Items that are actually weapons (such as **Weapon Team**) now appear in the **Weapons** section instead of being listed under Special Rules.
**Generate Cards** now loads instantly from your saved copy when the list is already cached — use the new **Refresh List** button to pull the latest version from Army Forge when you need it.
